author: gb9t
content:
**Phase A complete (foundation tier).**

Six documents on disk under .design/, six knowledge pages, four tracking issues.

Documents:
- .design/00-overview.md (215 lines, 15 REQ / 15 AC, D1-D6 resolved, 0 open)
- .design/00-baseline.md (frontmatter convention + pin to commit 27a26ccfd528 + rebaseline procedure)
- .design/00-rust-conventions.md (365+ lines, 17 REQ / 18 AC, D1-D2 resolved, 0 open) — verification stack (Kani / TLA+ / Creusot-Verus-Prusti) fully detailed
- .design/00-glossary.md (91 entries, all source paths resolve, ≥40 by AC-5 of overview)
- .design/00-index.md (registry + coverage map + Phase B/C/D/E plan)
- .design/references/grsec-pax-notes.md (deferred-doc reading list, 14MB grsec patch cataloged)

All cross-doc upstream-paths frontmatter validated: zero MISS.
All 15 architecture-section paths in 00-overview.md verified.
All 91 glossary source paths verified.

Tracking issues opened (all blocked by #1):
- #2 medium  Author 00-security-principles.md grounded in grsec/PaX catalog
- #3 high    Author Rookery-specific clippy lints (HARD prereq for any subsystem implementation per D1)
- #4 medium  Author missing rust-for-linux abstractions (RwSemaphore, Kthread spawn, PerCpu)

Phase B is the next stage: per-subsystem 00-overview.md docs (Tier 2). 00-index.md proposes order driven by dependency: arch/, arch/x86/, lib/, mm/, kernel/, fs/, block/, net/, ipc/, crypto/, security/, init/, io_uring/, virt/, drivers/, sound/. Once mm/ and arch/x86/ overviews land, unblock issue #2 to author 00-security-principles.md per D6.

This issue stays OPEN — it is the multi-phase tracking issue for the entire reverse-engineering pass.
